root.titleDefault: Panda Tenis · Tennis School for Kids
root.description: Panda Tenis Association: a tennis school where children learn to love the sport in a fun, safe environment with a progressive level-based methodology.

home.title: Tennis school for kids in Mijas
home.description: Panda Tenis offers tennis classes for kids from age 3, camps, intensives, and social-impact projects on the Mijas Costa.

camps.title: Camps
camps.description: Panda Tenis camps for kids aged 3 to 14 in summer, Christmas and Easter.

about.title: About us
about.description: Story of the Panda Tenis Association, a tennis school for kids in Mijas with a social mission and strong sports values.

inscription.title: Sign up
inscription.description: Registration form for Panda Tenis school and camps in Mijas Costa.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.description: Privacy policy of the Panda Tenis Association.

footer.brandBlurb: A tennis school where kids discover the sport through play, learn values, and grow both on and off the court.
footer.copyright: © {year} Panda Tenis Association · All rights reserved.

hero.subtitle: Classes for kids from age 3 in Mijas Costa: a fun methodology, real technique, and a community that grows together on court.

steps.title: Three steps to step on court.
steps.description: We check spots, age and level so every student starts in the right group.

write.title: Message us
write.description: Tell us the student's age, experience and availability.

places.title: We check spots
places.description: We review the group that best fits by level and schedule.

start.title: On court!
start.description: The student joins the group that best fits their age and level and starts training.

method.title: Four pillars that make the difference.
method.description: Every class combines technique, cognition, movement and teamwork.

technique.title: Proper technique from day one
technique.description: They build strokes and footwork through tailored games so the technique sticks for life.

pandaGame.title: Panda Tenis Game
pandaGame.description: Focus, concentration and memory through challenges that mix court, strategy and fun.

psicomotor.title: Motor skills
psicomotor.description: Circuits and drills to improve coordination, balance, agility and body confidence.

fun.title: Fun and friendship
fun.description: Every class creates a joyful space to learn, share and feel part of the team.

levels.title: A level for every stage.
levels.description: Courts, balls and rules adapted to the student's age to guarantee continuous learning.

red.name: Red
red.text: First strokes, coordination, games and lots of confidence.

orange.name: Orange
orange.text: Basic technique, adapted court and low-pressure balls.

green.name: Green
green.text: Rallying, serve, simple tactics and first matches.

yellow.name: Yellow
yellow.text: Regulation ball, technical goals and competition.

home.marquee: Panda Tenis · Mijas Costa · ITF Play + Stay · From age 3 ·

sahara.title: An association with a social mission
sahara.description: We bring tennis to children in the Sahara, donate gear, and bring the sport closer to those with fewer opportunities. Tennis as a tool for inclusion.

values.title: Tennis as a school of life.
values.description: What they learn on court goes with the kids well beyond the sport.

environment.title: Caring environment
environment.text: Supervised groups, age-appropriate gear and safe courts.

sports.title: Sports values
sports.text: Respect, effort, teamwork and the drive to improve.

community.title: Community
community.text: Families, camps and intensives around tennis.

allCount.title: Everyone counts
allCount.text: Every student gets recognition for their progress.

gallery.title: A glimpse of our court.
gallery.description: Real photos from day to day: classes, challenges, gear and the court at sunset.

items.question: How long is a tennis class?
How do I sign up for the Tennis School?
items.answer: You can fill in the registration form on this site or reach out directly via WhatsApp or email to check available spots and complete the form.

items.question: If the student misses a class, what happens?
items.answer: Only classes missed for a documented illness can be made up. For other reasons the class is considered lost.

items.question: If it rains, is there class?
items.answer: When it rains or the court isn't in good condition, the school announces the cancellation as soon as the decision is made.

items.question: What does my child need to bring to class?
items.answer: Sportswear and sneakers, water and a racket if they have one. If not, Panda Tenis lends one.

items.question: Are there classes for adults?
items.answer: The school's main focus is on kids and teens, though depending on availability we may explore options for adults. Get in touch to check.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.description: Pick whatever fits you best: regular season or holiday camps. Each one has its own form.

registrationPaths.title: What would you like to sign your child up for?
registrationPaths.description: We run the regular weekly season and holiday camps for specific dates. Message us on WhatsApp and we'll send the private form once the place is confirmed.

school.title: Regular classes
bullets: One class per week throughout the school year
Groups by level (Red, Orange, Green, Yellow)
Personal attention in small groups by level
You pick preferred days and time slots when signing up

camps.title: Camps
bullets: Any level welcome, even if you're not enrolled in the school

levelFinder.title: Which level fits your child?
levelFinder.description: Pick their age and we'll show which color of the ITF system they'd start at.
levelFinder.olderHint: Older than 16? Message us on WhatsApp and we'll look at options.

rojo.name: Red
rojo.pitch: First strokes, motor-skill games and lots of confidence on a short court.

naranja.name: Orange
naranja.pitch: Basic forehand, backhand and serve on an intermediate court.

verde.name: Green
verde.pitch: Long rallies, first matches and tactical work.

amarillo.name: Yellow
amarillo.pitch: Official ball, technical goals and competition option.

contactBand.title: We chat, check spots and find the group that fits.
contactBand.description: Get in touch with the school to check availability for the 25/26 season and reserve your spot.

hero.title: Camps for kids aged 3 to 14.
hero.description: Fun, friendship and learning with tennis as the main sport and a program that mixes court, games, creativity and recognition.

program.title: A week to play, grow and go home with a story.
program.description: Camp blends tennis training, multi-sport, crafts, cognitive challenges and languages so every day feels fresh.

tennis.title: Daily tennis
tennis.text: Matches, team challenges and adapted games every day.

multisport.title: Multi-sport
multisport.text: Activities to discover new skills and move joyfully.

crafts.title: Crafts
crafts.text: Creative breaks to imagine and work together.

memory.title: Memory & focus
memory.text: Panda Tenis Game challenges to think, remember and decide better.

languages.title: Languages through play
languages.text: Activities in Spanish and English to learn without feeling like school.

water.title: Water in summer
water.text: Pool and water games when the calendar and weather allow.

tournament.title: Friday tournament
tournament.text: Every Friday we compete in a tennis tournament and finish with a medal and prize ceremony for everyone.

castle.title: Bouncy castle
castle.text: A bouncy castle every week: an inflatable water castle in summer and the classic bouncy castle the rest of the year.

seasons.title: Camps at the key moments of the school year.
seasons.description: Panda Tenis runs camps during school breaks so families have an active, local option with strong values.

trophies.title: Every week ends celebrating effort.
trophies.description: We close with a ceremony where every participant is recognized for attitude, progress and participation. Competition counts, but the journey counts too.
trophies.ageNote: Groups adapted by age, level and autonomy.

hero.title: A place where kids discover tennis by playing.
hero.description: Panda Tenis isn't just a school. It's a family growing around sport, respect, effort and joy.

origin.title: Tennis as a school of life.
origin.description: The project was born from many years teaching kids and teens, convinced that tennis teaches focus, concentration, commitment, effort, sacrifice and respect.
origin.p1: Tennis teaches you not to give up, to fight every point, to build strategies and adapt with intelligence in every situation. But the most valuable thing is the people, friendships and experiences that stay.
origin.p2: After many years dedicated to teaching, Panda Tenis became an association to reach further: donating gear, easing access to the sport and building social-impact projects that promote equal opportunities.

association.title: Panda Tenis Association
association.description: Based in Mijas, we work passionately to instill sport values, promote a healthy lifestyle and prove that a child who plays is a happy child.

goals.title: From the court to the community.
goals.description: The association blends school, events and social projects to take tennis further.

promote.title: Promote tennis
promote.text: So every kid, regardless of means, can enjoy this sport.

values.title: Instill positive values
values.text: Communication, integration, socialization, effort and respect through sport.

events.title: Run sports events
events.text: Camps, intensives, parties and recreational activities in a welcoming setting.

help.title: Help kids in need
help.text: Collecting and donating gear to bring tennis to more communities.

participate.title: Join a family that moves tennis with joy.
participate.description: Take part in events, donate gear or share the Panda Tenis vision. Together we can bring the sport and its values to more kids.

inscription.title: Reserve your spot at Panda Tenis.

success.title: Registration sent!
success.description: We've received your request for {course}. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

info.title: Registration form
info.intro: I'm Darío, director of the Panda Tenis Association.
info.alsoPlatform: We'll also sign you up on our digital platform, where you'll be able to track achievements and progress in a fun and motivating way.
info.pickCourse: Pick the course or camp you'd like to sign up for:

email.title: Enter your email
email.hint1: Enter your email. If you've been with the school before, try the same email you used last season.
email.hint2: We will not show previous details for privacy; the family always completes the current form.

student.title: Student details
student.intro: Enter the student's details. If under-age, you'll be able to add your own information as parent/guardian below.

scheduling.title: Class availability
scheduling.hint: This helps us place the student in the group that best fits your afternoons. Tick everything that works for you.
scheduling.notePlaceholder: e.g. can't pick up at 19:30, sister in the Orange group…

terms.title: Legal texts
terms.intro: Review the following legal texts and sign the form to proceed.

termsBody.heading: Panda Tenis Association — Terms & conditions
termsBody.p1: By registering, parents or legal guardians accept that the student has no illnesses, allergies or other limitations that might interfere with their participation in the scheduled activities.
termsBody.p2: In case of any relevant medical condition, accurate notification to the Panda Tenis Association is required.
termsBody.p3: It is the sole responsibility of the parents or legal guardians to ensure drop-off and pick-up of the student at the facility where the activity takes place, both at the start and the end.
termsBody.p4: Registration implies acceptance of all terms and conditions stated above.

imagesBody.heading: Panda Tenis Association — Image consent
imagesBody.p1: We want to inform you that during your children's sports activities we'll take photos and videos to document their progress and celebrate their achievements.
imagesBody.p2: These images will be used exclusively for internal use by the Panda Tenis Association, as well as promotional material on social networks and our websites.
imagesBody.p3: We commit to use these images respectfully and to protect the privacy of every child.
imagesBody.p4: If you do not authorise the use of the minor's images, please let the Panda Tenis Association know in advance.

terms.consentLabel: I give my consent for the creation of multimedia content.
terms.autoAccept: Terms & conditions. By signing this form you automatically accept all terms and conditions.

signature.title: Sign here
signature.hint: Sign with your finger, mouse or stylus inside the box.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.updated: Last updated: May 2026. We've replaced the generic WordPress policy with a clear version focused on how the school actually handles requests.

sections.title: Who we are
sections.text: This site represents the Panda Tenis Association. You can reach us via the phone, WhatsApp or email shown on the site.

sections.title: Data you may send us
sections.text: When you write via WhatsApp, phone or email, we may receive your name, contact details and the information needed to answer your request about classes, camps or tournaments.

sections.title: Purpose
sections.text: We use the data to handle enquiries, registrations, communication with families and to run Panda Tenis sports activities.

sections.title: Retention
sections.text: We keep the information for the time needed to handle the request, run the activity and meet applicable administrative obligations.

sections.title: Rights
sections.text: You can request access, rectification or deletion of your data by writing to info@pandatenis.com.

sections.title: Embedded content and external links
sections.text: The site may link to WhatsApp, Google Maps or other external services. Opening those links applies their own privacy policies.

login.asideDescription: Manage students, attendance, payments and family communication in a single panel built for coordinators who'd rather act than dig.
login.support: Trouble signing in? Email support and we rotate the password right away.

errors.backendUnavailable: The backend connection isn't configured. Let the tech team know.
errors.invalid: The email or password is incorrect.

noAccess.title: No access
noAccess.description: Your account doesn't have admin permissions. If you think this is a mistake, contact the school coordinator.

calendar.title: Activity calendar
calendar.description: Plan the school's year at a glance. Tap any day to add an event.

attendance.title: Attendance control
attendance.description: Mark who showed up, who let us know, and who missed without notice. The history feeds the dashboard indicator.

students.title: Student management
students.description: Each student's profile, with guardian, assigned group and coach notes.

leads.title: Interested leads
leads.description: Families who asked for info from the site or directly. Call them or start WhatsApp with an approved template.

groups.title: Group management
groups.description: Plan groups by level, assign a coach and check capacity.

planner.title: Weekly planner
planner.description: Weekly view of every group and its students. Auto-assignment by day/time preferences, with manual fine-tuning.

privateLessons.title: Private lessons
privateLessons.description: 1-on-1 sessions outside the group. Mark each class as paid to add it to the monthly revenue.

medals.title: Medals & recognitions
medals.description: The school's gamification system. Recognize effort and keep motivation high.

reports.title: Quarterly reports
reports.description: Per-quarter technical feedback with progress bars, comments and a send-to-family flow.

gallery.title: Club gallery
gallery.description: Upload photos and videos, share moments with families and always respect image consent.

campus.title: Camps
campus.description: Custom sessions outside the regular school calendar: summer camp, Christmas or themed stages. Each session is defined with its own name and dates.

registrations.title: Registrations
registrations.description: Registrations received for the school and camps.

whatsappChats.title: WhatsApp conversations
whatsappChats.description: Chat one-on-one with each family from the panel. Incoming messages appear in real time.

whatsappConnection.title: WhatsApp connection
whatsappConnection.description: Status of the number connected to WhatsApp Business Cloud API and inbound webhook configuration.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Inbox, templates and bulk sends with Meta Cloud API. Import families from CSV or TSV without fighting the format.

payments.title: Payments & receipts
payments.description: Manage receipts, mark them as paid and automatically trigger the official numbering.

settings.title: School settings
settings.description: General data and thresholds that feed the panel and receipts.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's the school's pulse.
dashboard.noAttendanceDesc: Once you log the first classes you'll see the weekly trend here.
dashboard.noPaymentsDesc: When a student has an open receipt, it'll show up here.
dashboard.noRevenueDesc: As soon as you mark a payment paid you'll see the curve grow here.
dashboard.noClassesDesc: Schedule the next sessions from the Groups or Calendar section.

command.title: Command palette
command.placeholder: Search students, payments, leads or go to…

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: We could not load this section. It may be temporary — please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.
